name: proc_creation_win_susp_sysnative
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"*:\\Windows\\Sysnative\\*" or process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Sysnative\\*") and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\v*", "*C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\v*", "*C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\v*", "*C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\v*")) and process.executable:"*\\ngen.exe" and process.command_line:"*install*")) and (not (process.command_line:"*\"C:\\Windows\\sysnative\\cmd.exe\"*" and process.command_line:"*\\xampp\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\catalina_start.bat*"))
